evals.prompt: I have a Pocket export CSV at evals/files/pocket-sample.csv with 10 articles. Distill the insights and save to evals/files/test-vault-1/.
evals.expected_output: A vault with insight notes for genuinely insightful articles, noise entries in _noise.md, and a .distill-state.yaml file.
assertions: The skill triggers from a Pocket export mention
Classification uses Sonnet model, not the session model
Each insight note has YAML frontmatter with url, title, source: pocket-export, confidence, insight_summary, and concepts
Noise articles are listed in _noise.md, not given individual notes
Insight rate is between 10-40% of classifiable articles

evals.prompt: Check this article for me: https://danluu.com/cocktail-ideas/
evals.expected_output: The skill fetches the URL, classifies it as insight or noise with reasoning, and asks whether to add to vault.
assertions: The article content is fetched and read
A verdict is presented with confidence level and reasoning
The user is asked whether to add to vault before writing anything

evals.prompt: hey can you go through my browser bookmarks and find anything worth keeping? save to evals/files/test-vault-3/
evals.expected_output: The skill asks which browser to use, detects installed browsers, and runs the full pipeline.
assertions: The skill asks the user which browser/source to process
Domain triage uses the domain cache
The pipeline follows the 8-phase structure from SKILL.md
